title.en: Therefore, Ye Tian can only take his time and n...

content.en:
It was not easy to gather ten middle-level realm gods who had cultivated at the peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and the time and resources required were unimaginable, even greater than the price paid to cultivate one's wife and children.

Therefore, Ye Tian can only take his time and not rush.

In fact, those top forces will not cultivate middle-level realm gods, but let those middle-level realm gods work their own, go to the outside world to find opportunities or kill with demon seeds.

As a result, many middle-level realm gods have fallen, but as long as a middle-level peak realm god can be born, it will not be a loss, if a high-level realm god can be born, it will be blood gain!

But the middle-level realm gods of the human race are too rare, and they can't withstand such losses.

Fortunately, the number of Terran Eternal Kingdoms in the Eternal Realm has increased by tens of thousands, causing the resources of the Terran to skyrocket, at least cultivating ordinary realm gods, relying on these resources is enough.

Before you know it, another 100 billion years have passed.

Daughter Ye Xingyue's injuries have not yet recovered, and she is temporarily unable to impact the high-level realm gods.

However, during this period of time, the human race has given birth to many realm gods, and several middle-level realm gods have also been born.

Moreover, the Death 05 Death Zone of the Eternal Realm has been greatly reduced.

According to estimates, the Eternal Realm has now recovered about one-thousandth of its territory, which is already an incomparably vast territory.

Now, almost all of these territories have been blown by the top forces of the Realm God Realm, and they have sent Realm Gods and a large number of Eternal Dao Realms to occupy them, build ancient cities, and divide the territory.

Anyway, the territory is vast, and they will not compete with each other, after all, they are all ordinary resources, not resources that are incomparably precious enough to make the hearts of the top forces move, so they will naturally not fight to the death.

......

Terran, here in the Endless Realm Alliance.

The surrounding death zones were also successfully transformed, and Ye Tian also took the opportunity to let a large number of Eternal Dao Realms build cities in the surrounding territories, expanding the actual territory of the Endless Realm Alliance by more than ten times, forming an incomparably vast territory.

The same is true of the Terran Eternal Realms in other territories, which occupy more and more extensive territory.

this day.

A realm god of the human race reported to Ye Tian on the situation of the Eternal Realm.

"Ancestor, near the Sea and Mountain Country, a boundary gap has appeared!" the Celebrity Realm God reported.

"Boundary Rift, are you sure?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Sure!" the realm god replied.

Ye Tian pondered, this is not ordinary news.

There was no boundary crack before the Eternal Realm, at most there was a demon seed abyss projection, but now there is a boundary crack, which means that more and more boundary cracks will appear in the future!

And the country of sea and mountains is an eternal kingdom of the human race, and it has not been opened for too long, and it is relatively far away from the endless kingdom alliance of the human race, and there are not many realm gods guarding there.

"Has the word spread?"

Ye Tian asked.

The realm god shook his head, "Ancestor, the news hasn't spread yet, after discovering it, several realm gods of our human race blocked it, and even the other human races didn't know about it, so they reported it as soon as possible." "

"Okay, I'll go take a look!"

Ye Tian said.

......

The land of seamounts.

Ye Tian came here and found the boundary crack.

After seeing Ye Tian, several realm gods guarding this boundary crack immediately said respectfully: "I've seen the ancestor!"

"You haven't been in, have you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Ancestor, our strength is very weak, we don't dare to enter the boundary crack!"

They had also heard of the boundary rift, and knew that the terrifying one on the other side of the boundary crack was connected to the abyss of the demon seed, and no one knew how many demon seeds there would be here, and they were also worried that the demon seed would come in, so they notified Ye Tian as soon as possible.

In their opinion, only Ye Tian Ancestor could handle this matter.

Ye Tian stepped into this gap in the world.

As soon as he entered this rift, a supreme force suppressed him.

This is the strength of the entire world crack suppressing him!

In this regard, Ye Tian did not feel strange at all, the Boundary Gap actually only did not suppress the strength of the Middle Realm Realm God, but it would suppress the strength of the high-level Realm God, which was even more powerful than the Boundary Gap Realm.

After all, in terms of grade, the boundary gap is even lower than the boundary of the boundary seam, such a low-level place, the high-level realm god has come in, it is strange if he does not suppress it!

And the resources of the boundary seam are far less than the boundary of the boundary seam, and the resources of the boundary seam can be quickly bred, but the resources of the boundary seam cannot be quickly bred.

That is, the value of the initial boundary rift is higher, and once it is almost mined, the value of the boundary rift is lower.

When Ye Tian entered here, a middle-level demon seed appeared and attacked Ye Tian.

"It's not good, it's a high-level realm god, run away!"

These middle-level demon species are not stupid, but they don't think that they can besiege and kill Ye Tian, a high-level realm god. []

Even if the strength of the high-level realm god is suppressed, it is more powerful than the middle-level peak demon seed!

And most of them are just ordinary middle-level demon species, where do they dare to besiege and kill Ye Tian!

However.

Ye Tian's heart moved, heaven and earth were imprisoned, and the bodies of these middle-level demon seeds seemed to be frozen.

Then, Ye Tian's right hand shook the void.

Boom!!!!

The bodies of the mid-level demon seeds exploded, and the resources on their bodies automatically flew into Ye Tian's hands and were put away by Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to explore this rift.

......

"This boundary crack should have been born not long ago, and the 293 source is okay, although it is not of much use to me, but many resources here are useful to the mid-level realm gods!" Ye Tian muttered.

He is going to clean up the demon seed here, and the demon seed that kills the demon seed in the abyss of the demon seed will not dare to step into this place casually, and then let the gods of the human race enter here to collect resources.

Ye Tian's speed is very fast, constantly shuttling, and killing when he encounters a demon seed.

Soon, the news spread, and many demon seeds were frightened and retreated.

After a while, Ye Tian came out of this boundary.

He then allowed many of the Terran's realm gods to enter the rift and build a base in the rift for rest, healing, and dwelling.

Moreover.

Ye Tian also let those middle-level realm gods of the human race also enter here, so that when he encounters a middle-level demon seed, he also has the ability to resist.

After all, Ye Tian won't waste a copy body, and he has been guarding here!

Of course.

If there is a problem here, he will still come over as soon as possible.

At the beginning, many realm gods were still worried about encountering the demon seed and being killed by the demon seed, but as many human realm gods found good things, other realm gods were also moved and applied to enter this realm crack one after another.

In this way, this rift in the human race is constantly scraped by the gods of the human race, and these resources can not only improve their strength, but also cultivate more world gods for the human race.
